SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:37am
Judge Pro Tem James Fleming, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Sampson Ouk appears in pro per with his Khmai interpeter, Kim Lay. Respondent, Jessica Yan appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Fleming.

EXHR (1) Transfer & Reassignment, 3 pages
EXHA (A) Letter dated November 1, 2010 and various other documents

Miguel Quesada is called as a witness for the Appellant.

9:54am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
